history.summary: 1 Validator Index documentation error fixed: Hotel Banner section line 329 — .title-city suffix <li> said 'Cleanliness Checks Rule 561' (wrong; Rule 561 is check_sidebar_panel_background in brain_check). Corrected to 'Cleanliness Checks Rule 563' (TITLE-CITY CONTAINS STATE/REGION SUFFIX). The header meta div (line 29) already noted the correction was made but the actual <li> body had not been updated. All 13 CORE RULES INTEGRITY + BUILD STATE checks and all 13 DOCUMENT HEAD checks verified correct in code. Smoke-tested on Amsterdam, London, Bahamas: all passed (840 checks, 0 failures). brain_check: 195/195 ok, 0 fail.

5 fixes applied in Part 2 (🔗 LINKS) validator audit: (1) validate_itinerary.py: ALL ANCHORS check (lines 1887-1908) had '# Rule 556' in comments — corrected to '# Rules 557 + 559' (Rule 557 = non-.title-address anchors no ↗; Rule 559 = .title-address no Unicode ↗). (2) validate_itinerary.py: .stop-photos non-img check (line 5536) said '(Rule 557)' — corrected to '(Rule 558)'. (3) validate_itinerary.py CHANGELOG: both stale CHANGELOG entries updated with correct rule numbers. (4) Validator Index: 'NON-TITLE-ADDRESS ANCHORS WITH ↗ (Rule 557)' entry was misplaced in 📖 READ ABOUT STORY PAGE section; moved to 🔗 LINKS section as a combined 'All anchors — no ↗ (Rules 557 + 559)' entry reflecting the code's actual scope. All 23+ link checks verified correct in code. (5) validate_itinerary.py: 'LINK STYLING — no inline text-decoration on <a>' check label cited 'banned per Icon Order and Format.html §6, locked 2026-05-19' — stale; §6 was retired when rule was re-homed to Links.html § 8 on 2026-06-06. Label corrected to cite Links.html § 8. Adjacent comment at line ~27625 also updated to reflect the re-homing. No logic changes — documentation corrections only. 4 smoke tests passed (Amsterdam, London, Bhutan, Oxford). brain_check: 195/195 ok.

1 Validator Index documentation error fixed: line 894 (Claude Inspiration section) incorrectly documented the theme-{color} class as REQUIRED when CORE RULES §2 explicitly says it is FORBIDDEN ('No theme-{color} class on outer div; plain white background'). Root cause: the 2026-07-17 Part 17 audit reversed the polarity (from forbidden to required), then the revert restored the code same day, but the Validator Index was only updated for the first change, not the revert. Validator Index corrected. Stale To Do List 'disagreement' entry removed (was never a real disagreement — code and CORE RULES already agreed). CI backfill task updated: removed wrong theme-{color} requirement, kept valid pill-label-only fixes for 19 guides. All 12 CORE RULES INTEGRITY+BUILD STATE checks and all 13 DOCUMENT HEAD checks verified correct in code.

3 Validator Index documentation errors fixed: (1) Michelin section note at L804 updated — removed stale 'no hours, walk, ride, or closed rows' description; now accurately reflects §3b format (Cuisine + 📍 + 🚶/🚕 required; 🏛/🚫 banned by Check J; §3a retains 🏛/🚫). (2) Michelin L817 fixed — removed '🚶 walk, 🚕 ride' from the banned-rows list (they're required by Check D, not banned; L817 was directly contradicted by L818 in the same doc). (3) Pickleball L794 fixed — US-gate description updated to reflect that the primary detection signal is .title-country == 'United States' (fixed 2026-07-06); state-code patterns from .title-address were kept only as informational hints but the Index still described them as the gate trigger. All 24 Pickleball checks and all Michelin checks verified correct vs code. CORE RULES §3b vs Check J discrepancy parked in To Do List Open Questions for owner resolution (CORE RULES shows 🏛/🚫 in §3b template; validator bans them — ambiguous whether CORE RULES needs cleanup or validator needs updating).

2 bugs fixed: (1) T_NEW5 theme-{color} polarity reversed — 2026-07-12 rule FORBADE the class; CORE RULES §2+§4 have always REQUIRED it. Flip applied. (2) CI pill label enforcement added — _OVERVIEW_PILL_CANONICAL_ORDER and _OVERVIEW_PILL_CANONICAL_LABELS were both missing 'claude-inspiration'. §2 explicitly fixes the label as '✨ Claude Inspiration'. Both entries added. CI spec calibration anchor added for §2 fixed pill label. 220 guides need theme-class backfill; 19 guides need pill label fix — listed in To Do List.
All 20 Stations + 29 Day Trips Validator Index checks already correctly implemented. No code gaps found.

20 gaps fixed in Validator Index: 9 missing brain_check.py functions documented, Currency Guide updated-stamp description corrected, 4 missing fleet validators added (validate_also_on_site_pills, validate_climate_coverage, validate_travel_stats, validate_safety_guide), 6 missing builders added (build_nearby_guides, build_guide_map, build_guides_index, build_guides_index_full, build_climate, update_currency_rates), 6 missing infrastructure scripts added (blast_radius, photo_provenance, audit_transit_dupes, replace_best_of_grid, fix_best_of_format, update_audit_rolling_report).

2 enforcement gaps closed in GLOBAL / CROSS-SECTION section. (1) Non-ASCII whitespace global check: Validator Index line 959 claimed 'global hard fail' but code only checked U+2004/U+200A after 🚕 in motion banner divs. New check scans full visible text (tags+comments stripped) for all banned Unicode spaces (U+00A0, U+2000-U+200B, U+202F, U+205F, U+3000, U+FEFF). Carve-out: U+200A after ❗/❗️ in Heads Up titles exempt. Immediately caught U+200A in Singapore v3 motion banner row (U+200A in '🚕 3 min →' — outside the position the 🚕-specific check watches). (2) Global inline style= on <div>: Validator Index line 960 claimed global check for margin/padding/border/background/color/display/width/height/opacity/flex/grid/position/z-index but only per-class checks existed. New check scans all <div style=...> for banned layout/paint properties; display:none sentinel exempt. 0 current guides affected (preventive).

1 bug fixed: Dead overview plus-connector check — the no-+ connector check on .overview-day-title cards had a regex requiring 🎒 (backpack) in the title text. Since 🎒 was banned from all guide HTML on 2026-06-16, the overview check never matched anything and silently passed every guide. Fixed: regex replaced with scan of ALL .overview-day-title divs, extracting stop-list portion (after en-dash separator), skipping Train Day cards (🚆), and hard-failing on \w\s*+\s*\w in stop list. All other Part 3 checks (13 stop-title + 12 stop-description items) already correctly implemented. Validator Index updated: '.overview-day-stops lines' corrected to '.overview-day-title divs' in 2 places.

session_history.result: fixed — 1 code enforcement gap closed: Phase 5 build_state _bs_shipped_ids scan added detection of class="claude-inspiration" divs (claude-inspiration is mandatory since 2026-07-12 but uses its own class, not extras-section). Without this fix, Claude Inspiration - Extra Section.html was never added to _bs_p5_required, so the Phase 5 check never enforced that the spec was read. Validator Index updated with detection-path notes and fix date. 32 old guides (built before the 2026-07-12 mandate) now correctly fail Phase 5 — logged to To Do List for build_state.md backfill. brain_check: 193/194 ok, 0 fail.

Corrected to match CORE RULES Claude Inspiration - Extra Section.html §2 ('No theme-{color} class on outer div; plain white background'). Also removed stale To Do List entry about the supposed validator/CORE RULES disagreement (already resolved). Updated CI backfill task in To Do List: removed wrong theme-{color} requirement, kept valid pill-label fixes. All 25 checks (12 CORE RULES INTEGRITY+BUILD STATE, 13 DOCUMENT HEAD) correctly implemented. Smoke-tested on 5 shipped guides (Bahamas, Madrid, Rio-de-Janeiro, Chongqing, Queenstown): all passed. brain_check: 0 failures.

session_history.result: clean — 22 items verified, no gaps found, 5 smoke tests passed

fixed — 1 documentation gap closed: guide filename hard-fail check added to Validator Index (L48, CORE RULES INTEGRITY section). Check existed in code (validate_itinerary.py L517-L544, added 2026-06-28) but was absent from the index. 5 smoke tests passed.

clean — deep re-verification pass. All 14 STOP TITLES checks and all 13+ STOP DESCRIPTIONS checks verified correctly implemented. No new gaps found since crib-3 fixed the tombstoned ↳+📖 merge check earlier this cycle. Smoke-tested Amsterdam (840 passed, 0 failed) and Tokyo (passed). brain_check: 195/195 ok, 0 fail.

fixed — 1 code gap closed: tombstoned ↳+📖 merge check replaced with real implementation. The stub at lines 25501-25510 always passed (empty list, never populated) and carried stale comment claiming ↳ is 'not detectable as emoji'. Wrong — ↳ is U+21B3, a unicode character detectable via string search. New check scans all <div> tags, peeks 20 chars to find ones that open with ↳, then calls _walk_balanced_div and checks if 📖 appears in the same element's content. Hard-fail label updated to remove tombstone language. Validator Index already had class="yes" (correct) — no Index change needed. Smoke-tested Amsterdam (pass) and London (pass). All other 13 STOP TITLES + 19 STOP DESCRIPTIONS checks already correctly implemented (verified this cycle from the 2026-07-18 run).

fixed — 1 documentation gap closed: maps-city-display check was downgraded from hard-fail to warn() in validate_itinerary.py on 2026-07-20 but Validator Index still showed class="yes" (hard-fail) in both the 🔗 LINKS section (line 104) and the TITLE PAGE / HOTEL BANNER section (line 315). Both updated to class="warn" with rationale (compound neighbourhood names like 'Downtown Santa Monica' are legitimate; suppressible with warn-ok: maps-city-display). Header meta div updated with dated changelog entry. Smoke-tested Amsterdam, London, Singapore, Vienna: all passed with signed stamps.

session_history.summary: 1 code gap closed + 4 Validator Index documentation gaps closed. Code: RNH §5b missing 🏛 hours-text check — code checked for presence of 🏛 row but not that it had non-empty text (parity with DR §5b dr_hours_empty check); else branch added to top3_shape_violations for empty 🏛 text. Index: 4 undocumented checks added — RNH prefix check (restaurant name before · link) + RNH Maps-search-URL ban + DR prefix check + DR Maps-search-URL ban. All 32 RNH items and all 29 DR items now correctly cross-referenced between code and Index.
DAYS_DATA Naples 3→4; Safety-Guide toolbar v103→v116 (template fix); artifact script now shows parts 21-30

session_history.result: clean — all checks verified correct, no gaps found
session_history.summary: Deep verification pass of all 40+ FLAG ROW and TOUR/TICKET BOX checks in validate_itinerary.py. All Validator Index ✅ entries for Part 5 confirmed implemented in code: 🏛 strict positive shape, ⏰ ~N hr format with hrs? regex (bare 'h' rejected per Rule 549 2026-07-19 tightening), 🚫 Closed {Weekday} only, 🆓 Free exactly, 💵 Cash Only exactly, ⚠️ non-empty, 📅 separator · only, no 📅 inside .ticket-box, universal icon order (🎟→🏛/⏳→🚫→⏰→🆓/💵→⚠️→📍), meeting-point in guided tours, pickup-row banned in ticket boxes, nested box ban, 🏨 pickup variants in Tours only, no inline style= on flag rows. Smoke-tested Amsterdam (840 pass, 0 fail), London (841/1 — climate only), Tokyo (880/1 — climate only), Vienna (881/1 — climate only). brain_check: 197/197 ok, 0 fail.

session_history.result: fixed — 1 Validator Index documentation error corrected
session_history.summary: All 37 TOURS Validator Index entries cross-checked against validate_itinerary.py (lines 16954-17894). 35 class='yes' checks verified correctly implemented; 2 class='no' checks correctly marked manual. 1 stale entry fixed: item #11 (Single-platform negative-finding box wrong padding) was class='yes' referencing a brain_check that never existed. Root cause: the CSS rule '#tours .tours-group + .entry-body { padding-top:8px }' was added and retired on the same date (2026-07-12) — the retirement comment in guide-style.css explains that negative-finding boxes now use class='extras-empty' (enforced by the check at line 17419-17448 and documented at Validator Index line 429). Changed item #11 from class='yes' to class='no' with a retirement note. No code changes. Smoke-tested 5 guides: Amsterdam, Lisbon, Milan, New-York, Zurich — all passed (0 hard failures).

2 bugs fixed in STOPS PER DAY sentinel handling. Bug 1: Check 1 (hard-fail) fell through to _thin_days.append() when a <!-- day-count: N — reason --> sentinel existed but had an unrecognized keyword, causing a spurious hard-fail. Fix: added 'continue' so Check 1 skips to the next day when any sentinel is present (Check 2 warn-only handles unrecognized keywords). Bug 2: _dc_carveout_kw in Check 1 was missing 'time-intensive' and 'nature-based' which were in Check 2's valid_carveout_kw — guides using those keywords would warn AND hard-fail simultaneously. Both added. Validator Index line 379 updated with complete keyword list and correction note. Smoke-tested Amsterdam, Zurich, Singapore, Bhutan: all passed cleanly.

All 3 Part 26 pages pass: Currency Guide (71 countries, date current, terracotta table design intact), Plug Adapter (table design intact), World Map (all 224 guides pinned, all hrefs correct depth/path, no spaces). Fleet coverage: all 224 guides in all surfaces. 2 new brain_check HARD-FAIL gates added: check_world_map_render_cities_disabled (Rule 577 — renderCities() must keep early return; guide-only pins invariant) and check_world_map_load_regions_disabled (Rule 578 — maybeLoadRegions() must keep early return; non-US/CA subdivisions disabled). brain_check: 197/197 ok (195 → 197), 0 fail. Cleanliness Checks.md updated with Rules 577-578. Validator Index updated with both new entries.

session_history.section: 🏨 TITLE PAGE / HOTEL BANNER + 🗺 TRIP OVERVIEW
session_history.summary: 1 Validator Index documentation error fixed: TRIP OVERVIEW canonical pill order entry (line 351) still said '(claude-inspiration is last but label/order not enforced — unresolved contradiction)' — stale artifact from before Part 17/20 (2026-07-17) added claude-inspiration to both _OVERVIEW_PILL_CANONICAL_ORDER and _OVERVIEW_PILL_CANONICAL_LABELS. Updated entry now documents that all 15 pill positions are enforced: weekly-closures → tours → cappuccino → restaurants → downtown → local-tastes → food-delivery → shows → getting-around → stations-near-hotel → day-trips-by-train → pickleball → michelin → heads-up → claude-inspiration; CI label locked at '✨ Claude Inspiration'; Trip Overview.html §3 resolves the former contradiction. Validator code was already correct — Index alone was stale. All TITLE PAGE and TRIP OVERVIEW checks verified against code. Smoke-tested London (pass, warnings only), Amsterdam (pre-existing climate data failure unrelated), Vienna (pass), Tokyo (pass). brain_check: 197/197 ok, 0 fail.
